title.en: Terms of Service & API Use Guidelines

subtitle.en: The legally binding terms and acceptable use guidelines governing your access to our cloud messaging dashboard, API tokens, WhatsApp integrations, and SMS delivery services. Last updated: June 1, 2026.
subtitle.pt: Os termos juridicamente vinculativos e diretrizes de uso aceitável que rigen seu acesso ao painel de mensagens em nuvem, tokens de API, integrações do WhatsApp e serviços de entrega de SMS. Última atualização: 1 de junho de 2026.
subtitle.es: Los términos legalmente vinculantes y pautas de uso aceptable que rigen su acceso a nuestro panel de mensajería en la nube, tokens de API, integraciones de WhatsApp y servicios de entrega de SMS. Última actualización: 1 de junio de 2026.
subtitle.id: Ketentuan yang mengikat secara hukum dan pedoman penggunaan yang wajar yang mengatur akses Anda ke dasbor pesan cloud, token API, integrasi WhatsApp, dan layanan pengiriman SMS kami. Terakhir diperbarui: 1 Juni 2026.
subtitle.ar: الشروط الملزمة قانونًا وإرشادات الاستخدام المقبول التي تحكم وصولك إلى لوحة معلومات الرسائل السحابية ورموز واجهة برمجة التطبيقات وتكاملات WhatsApp وخدمات تسليم الرسائل القصيرة. آخر تحديث: 1 يونيو 2026.
subtitle.tr: Bulut mesajlaşma kontrol panelimize, API anahtarlarımıza, WhatsApp entegrasyonlarımıza ve SMS gönderim hizmetlerimize erişiminizi düzenleyen yasal olarak bağlayıcı şartlar ve kabul edilebilir kullanım yönergeleri. Son güncelleme: 1 Haziran 2026.

content.en:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using StartMessaging's website, APIs, and services (collectively, the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

2. Description of Service

StartMessaging provides cloud-based messaging APIs that enable businesses to send and receive messages via the WhatsApp Business API. The Service includes API access, dashboard tools, documentation, and support. Your usage is billed on a monthly subscription and pay-as-you-go message volume basis.

3. Account Registration

To use the Service, you must create an account with accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and API keys. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account. We are not liable for losses arising from unauthorized use of your account.

4. Acceptable Use

You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations. You may NOT use the Service to:

  • Send spam or unsolicited messages to contacts who have not opted in
  • Send messages containing illegal, threatening, abusive, defamatory, or obscene content
  • Impersonate another person or entity
  • Distribute malware, phishing links, or other harmful content
  • Violate WhatsApp's Business Policy or Commerce Policy
  • Circumvent rate limits or abuse the API
  • Resell or sublicense API access without written authorization

5. WhatsApp Business API Compliance

As a Meta Business Solution Provider, we facilitate access to the WhatsApp Business API. Your use of WhatsApp messaging is subject to Meta's WhatsApp Business Policy, WhatsApp Commerce Policy, and Meta's Terms of Service. You are responsible for obtaining proper opt-in consent from message recipients and using approved message templates.

6. Pricing and Payment

Service pricing for subscription plans and usage fees is as published on our website and may be updated with 14 days' notice. Subscription fees are billed monthly, and message usage beyond the plan allowance is billed as incurred. We reserve the right to suspend the Service for overdue accounts. All fees are non-refundable except as specified in our Refund Policy.

7. Intellectual Property

The Service, including its software, documentation, APIs, and design, is owned by StartMessaging and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works from the Service. Your use of the Service does not grant you any ownership rights.

8. Service Uptime

We strive for 99.9% API uptime. Enterprise plan customers receive formal SLA guarantees. We are not liable for downtime caused by scheduled maintenance (with 24-hour notice), third-party service outages (Meta, telecommunications networks), or your misuse of the API.

9. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW.

10. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, STARTMESSAGING'S TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE FEES PAID BY YOU IN THE 3 MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM. WE ARE NOT LIABLE FOR INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES.

11. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold StartMessaging harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the Service, your violation of these Terms, or your infringement of any third-party rights.

12. Termination

Either party may terminate the Service at any time. We may suspend or terminate your account immediately if you violate these Terms or the Acceptable Use policy. Upon termination, your access to the Service will cease and your data will be deleted within 30 days, except as required by law.

13. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Haryana, India.

14. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms with 14 days' notice via email or website notice. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

15. Contact

For legal inquiries: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348
content.in:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using StartMessaging's website, APIs, and services (collectively, the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

2. Description of Service

StartMessaging provides developer APIs for sending OTP SMS messages (without DLT registration for eligible use cases), DLT-compliant transactional SMS, WhatsApp Business API messages, and authentication verification services. Access to the service requires a registered account and a pre-funded wallet balance.

3. Account Registration

To use the Service, you must create an account with accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and API keys. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account. We are not liable for losses arising from unauthorized use of your account.

4. Acceptable Use

You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations. You may NOT use the Service to:

  • Send spam or unsolicited messages to contacts who have not opted in
  • Send messages containing illegal, threatening, abusive, defamatory, or obscene content
  • Impersonate another person or entity
  • Conduct or facilitate phishing, smishing, fraud, or any form of deception targeting end users
  • Verify phone numbers for illegal purposes, including account takeover, identity fraud, or unauthorized access to third-party systems
  • Resell or sublicense API access without written authorization
  • Circumvent rate limits or abuse the API

5. SMS & DLT Compliance (India)

For SMS services in India, you acknowledge that messages are sent through DLT-registered routes in compliance with TRAI regulations. You agree to send only transactional messages through our non-DLT routes and to comply with the Telecom Commercial Communications Customer Preference Regulations (TCCCPR). You are responsible for obtaining and maintaining any DLT registrations, Principal Entity (PE) IDs, or template approvals required by TRAI for your messaging use case.

6. WhatsApp Business API Compliance

Your use of WhatsApp messaging is subject to Meta's WhatsApp Business Policy, WhatsApp Commerce Policy, and Meta's Terms of Service. You are responsible for obtaining proper opt-in consent from message recipients and using approved message templates.

7. Billing and Payments

The SMS and OTP verification services operate on a prepaid wallet model. You must maintain a positive wallet balance in INR. Charges are deducted at the rates shown on our pricing page at the time of each API request. Prices may change with 14 days' notice. Approved payment methods are processed securely via our PCI-DSS compliant partner Razorpay. Unused wallet balances can be reviewed for refunds per our Refund Policy.

8. Intellectual Property

The Service, including its software, documentation, APIs, and design, is owned by StartMessaging and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works from the Service. Your use of the Service does not grant you any ownership rights.

9. Service Level

We strive for 99.9% API uptime. We are not liable for downtime caused by scheduled maintenance, third-party service outages (Meta, telecom operators), force majeure events, or your misuse of the Service.

10. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, STARTMESSAGING'S TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE FEES PAID BY YOU IN THE 3 MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM. WE ARE NOT LIABLE FOR INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES.

11. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold StartMessaging harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the Service, your violation of these Terms, or your infringement of any third-party rights.

12. Termination

Either party may terminate the Service at any time. We may suspend or terminate your account immediately if you violate these Terms or the Acceptable Use policy. Upon termination, your access to the Service will cease and your data will be deleted within 30 days, except as required by law.

13. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Haryana, India.

14. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms with 14 days' notice via email or website notice. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

15. Contact

For legal inquiries: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348 | WhatsApp: +91 6376383348
content.pt:
1. Aceitação dos Termos

Ao acessar ou utilizar o site, APIs e serviços da StartMessaging (coletivamente, o "Serviço"), você concorda em estar vinculado a estes Termos de Uso ("Termos"). Se você não concordar com estes Termos, não utilize o Serviço. Se estiver usando o Serviço em nome de uma organização, você declara que tem autoridade para vincular essa organização a estes Termos.

2. Descrição do Serviço

A StartMessaging fornece APIs de mensagens baseadas em nuvem que permitem às empresas enviar e receber mensagens através da API do WhatsApp Business. O Serviço inclui acesso à API, ferramentas de painel, documentação e suporte. Seu uso é cobrado com base em assinatura mensal e volume de mensagens sob demanda.

3. Registro de Conta

Para usar o Serviço, você deve criar uma conta com informações precisas e completas. Você é responsável por manter a segurança das credenciais da sua conta e chaves de API. Você deve nos notificar imediatamente sobre qualquer acesso não autorizado à sua conta. Não somos responsáveis por perdas decorrentes do uso não autorizado da sua conta.

4. Uso Aceitável

Você concorda em usar o Serviço apenas para fins lícitos e em conformidade com todas as leis e regulamentos aplicáveis. Você NÃO pode usar o Serviço para:

  • Enviar spam ou mensagens não solicitadas para contatos que não deram consentimento
  • Enviar mensagens contendo conteúdo ilegal, ameaçador, abusivo, difamatório ou obsceno
  • Se passar por outra pessoa ou entidade
  • Distribuir malware, links de phishing ou outro conteúdo prejudicial
  • Violar a Política Comercial do WhatsApp ou a Política de Comércio
  • Contornar limites de taxa ou abusar da API
  • Revender ou sublicenciar o acesso à API sem autorização por escrito

5. Conformidade com a API do WhatsApp Business

Como Provedor de Soluções de Negócios da Meta, facilitamos o acesso à API do WhatsApp Business. O uso de mensagens do WhatsApp está sujeito à Política Comercial do WhatsApp, à Política de Comércio do WhatsApp e aos Termos de Serviço da Meta. Você é responsável por obter o consentimento adequado dos destinatários das mensagens e usar modelos de mensagem aprovados.

6. Preços e Pagamento

Os preços do Serviço para planos de assinatura e taxas de uso são conforme publicados em nosso site e podem ser atualizados com 14 dias de aviso prévio. As taxas de assinatura são cobradas mensalmente e o uso de mensagens além da quota do plano é cobrado conforme utilização. Reservamo-nos o direito de suspender o Serviço para contas em atraso. Todas as taxas não são reembolsáveis, exceto conforme especificado em nossa Política de Reembolso.

7. Propriedade Intelectual

O Serviço, incluindo seu software, documentação, APIs e design, é de propriedade da StartMessaging e protegido por leis de propriedade intelectual. Você não pode copiar, modificar, distribuir ou criar obras derivadas do Serviço. O uso do Serviço não lhe concede nenhum direito de propriedade.

8. Disponibilidade do Serviço

Nos esforçamos para manter 99,9% de disponibilidade da API. Clientes do plano Enterprise recebem garantias formais de SLA. Não somos responsáveis por indisponibilidade causada por manutenção programada (com aviso de 24 horas), interrupções de serviços de terceiros (Meta, redes de telecomunicações) ou uso indevido da API.

9. Isenção de Garantias

O SERVIÇO É FORNECIDO "COMO ESTÁ" E "CONFORME DISPONÍVEL", SEM GARANTIAS DE QUALQUER TIPO, EXPRESSAS OU IMPLÍCITAS, NA MÁXIMA EXTENSÃO PERMITIDA POR LEI.

10. Limitação de Responsabilidade

NA MÁXIMA EXTENSÃO PERMITIDA POR LEI, A RESPONSABILIDADE TOTAL DA STARTMESSAGING NÃO EXCEDERÁ AS TAXAS PAGAS POR VOCÊ NOS 3 MESES ANTERIORES À RECLAMAÇÃO. NÃO SOMOS RESPONSÁVEIS POR DANOS INDIRETOS, INCIDENTAIS, CONSEQUENCIAIS OU PUNITIVOS.

11. Indenização

Você concorda em indenizar e isentar a StartMessaging de quaisquer reclamações, danos ou despesas decorrentes do seu uso do Serviço, da sua violação destes Termos ou da sua infração de quaisquer direitos de terceiros.

12. Rescisão

Qualquer uma das partes pode rescindir o Serviço a qualquer momento. Podemos suspender ou encerrar sua conta imediatamente se você violar estes Termos ou a política de Uso Aceitável. Após a rescisão, seu acesso ao Serviço será encerrado e seus dados serão excluídos em até 30 dias, exceto conforme exigido por lei.

13. Lei Aplicável

Estes Termos são regidos pelas leis da Índia. Quaisquer disputas serão resolvidas nos tribunais de Haryana, Índia.

14. Alterações nos Termos

Podemos atualizar estes Termos com 14 dias de aviso prévio por e-mail ou aviso no site. O uso continuado após a data de vigência constitui aceitação dos Termos atualizados.

15. Contato

Para consultas jurídicas: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Telefone: +91 6376383348
content.es:
1. Aceptación de los Términos

Al acceder o utilizar el sitio web, las APIs y los servicios de StartMessaging (colectivamente, el "Servicio"), usted acepta estar vinculado por estos Términos de Uso ("Términos"). Si no está de acuerdo con estos Términos, no utilice el Servicio. Si utiliza el Servicio en nombre de una organización, usted declara que tiene la autoridad para vincular a dicha organización a estos Términos.

2. Descripción del Servicio

StartMessaging proporciona APIs de mensajería basadas en la nube que permiten a las empresas enviar y recibir mensajes a través de la API de WhatsApp Business. El Servicio incluye acceso a la API, herramientas de panel, documentación y soporte. Su uso se factura según un plan de suscripción mensual y volumen de mensajes bajo demanda.

3. Registro de Cuenta

Para utilizar el Servicio, debe crear una cuenta con información precisa y completa. Usted es responsable de mantener la seguridad de las credenciales de su cuenta y claves de API. Debe notificarnos inmediatamente sobre cualquier acceso no autorizado a su cuenta. No somos responsables de las pérdidas derivadas del uso no autorizado de su cuenta.

4. Uso Aceptable

Usted acepta utilizar el Servicio únicamente para fines lícitos y en cumplimiento con todas las leyes y regulaciones aplicables. NO puede utilizar el Servicio para:

  • Enviar spam o mensajes no solicitados a contactos que no hayan dado su consentimiento
  • Enviar mensajes con contenido ilegal, amenazante, abusivo, difamatorio u obsceno
  • Suplantar la identidad de otra persona o entidad
  • Distribuir malware, enlaces de phishing u otro contenido dañino
  • Violar la Política Comercial de WhatsApp o la Política de Comercio
  • Eludir los límites de velocidad o abusar de la API
  • Revender o sublicenciar el acceso a la API sin autorización por escrito

5. Cumplimiento de la API de WhatsApp Business

Como Proveedor de Soluciones de Negocios de Meta, facilitamos el acceso a la API de WhatsApp Business. Su uso de la mensajería de WhatsApp está sujeto a la Política Comercial de WhatsApp, la Política de Comercio de WhatsApp y los Términos de Servicio de Meta. Usted es responsable de obtener el consentimiento adecuado de los destinatarios de los mensajes y de utilizar plantillas de mensaje aprobadas.

6. Precios y Pagos

Los precios del Servicio para planes de suscripción y tarifas de uso son los publicados en nuestro sitio web y pueden actualizarse con 14 días de aviso previo. Las cuotas de suscripción se facturan mensualmente y el uso de mensajes más allá de la cuota del plan se factura según el consumo. Nos reservamos el derecho de suspender el Servicio por cuentas morosas. Todas las tarifas no son reembolsables, excepto según se especifique en nuestra Política de Reembolso.

7. Propiedad Intelectual

El Servicio, incluyendo su software, documentación, APIs y diseño, es propiedad de StartMessaging y está protegido por las leyes de propiedad intelectual. No puede copiar, modificar, distribuir ni crear obras derivadas del Servicio. Su uso del Servicio no le otorga ningún derecho de propiedad.

8. Disponibilidad del Servicio

Nos esforzamos por mantener una disponibilidad del 99,9% de la API. Los clientes del plan Enterprise reciben garantías formales de SLA. No somos responsables del tiempo de inactividad causado por mantenimiento programado (con aviso de 24 horas), interrupciones de servicios de terceros (Meta, redes de telecomunicaciones) o uso indebido de la API.

9. Exención de Garantías

EL SERVICIO SE PROPORCIONA "TAL CUAL" Y "SEGÚN DISPONIBILIDAD", SIN GARANTÍAS DE NINGÚN TIPO, EXPRESAS O IMPLÍCITAS, EN LA MÁXIMA MEDIDA PERMITIDA POR LA LEY.

10. Limitación de Responsabilidad

EN LA MÁXIMA MEDIDA PERMITIDA POR LA LEY, LA RESPONSABILIDAD TOTAL DE STARTMESSAGING NO EXCEDERÁ LAS TARIFAS PAGADAS POR USTED EN LOS 3 MESES ANTERIORES A LA RECLAMACIÓN. NO SOMOS RESPONSABLES DE DAÑOS INDIRECTOS, INCIDENTALES, CONSECUENTES O PUNITIVOS.

11. Indemnización

Usted acepta indemnizar y eximir de responsabilidad a StartMessaging frente a cualquier reclamación, daño o gasto derivado de su uso del Servicio, su violación de estos Términos o su infracción de derechos de terceros.

12. Rescisión

Cualquiera de las partes puede rescindir el Servicio en cualquier momento. Podemos suspender o cancelar su cuenta inmediatamente si viola estos Términos o la política de Uso Aceptable. Tras la rescisión, su acceso al Servicio cesará y sus datos serán eliminados en un plazo de 30 días, salvo que la ley exija lo contrario.

13. Ley Aplicable

Estos Términos se rigen por las leyes de la India. Cualquier disputa se resolverá en los tribunales de Haryana, India.

14. Cambios en los Términos

Podemos actualizar estos Términos con 14 días de aviso previo por correo electrónico o aviso en el sitio web. El uso continuado después de la fecha de entrada en vigor constituye la aceptación de los Términos actualizados.

15. Contacto

Para consultas legales: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Teléfono: +91 6376383348
content.id:
1. Penerimaan Ketentuan

Dengan mengakses atau menggunakan situs web, API, dan layanan StartMessaging (secara kolektif, "Layanan"), Anda setuju untuk terikat oleh Ketentuan Penggunaan ("Ketentuan") ini. Jika Anda tidak menyetujui Ketentuan ini, jangan gunakan Layanan. Jika Anda menggunakan Layanan atas nama organisasi, Anda menyatakan bahwa Anda memiliki wewenang untuk mengikat organisasi tersebut pada Ketentuan ini.

2. Deskripsi Layanan

StartMessaging menyediakan API perpesanan berbasis cloud yang memungkinkan bisnis mengirim dan menerima pesan melalui WhatsApp Business API. Layanan mencakup akses API, alat dasbor, dokumentasi, dan dukungan. Penggunaan Anda ditagih berdasarkan langganan bulanan dan volume pesan bayar-per-penggunaan.

3. Pendaftaran Akun

Untuk menggunakan Layanan, Anda harus membuat akun dengan informasi yang akurat dan lengkap. Anda bertanggung jawab untuk menjaga keamanan kredensial akun dan kunci API Anda. Anda harus segera memberi tahu kami tentang akses tidak sah ke akun Anda. Kami tidak bertanggung jawab atas kerugian yang timbul dari penggunaan tidak sah atas akun Anda.

4. Penggunaan yang Dapat Diterima

Anda setuju untuk menggunakan Layanan hanya untuk tujuan yang sah dan sesuai dengan semua hukum dan peraturan yang berlaku. Anda TIDAK boleh menggunakan Layanan untuk:

  • Mengirim spam atau pesan yang tidak diminta ke kontak yang belum memberikan persetujuan
  • Mengirim pesan yang berisi konten ilegal, mengancam, kasar, memfitnah, atau tidak senonoh
  • Menyamar sebagai orang atau entitas lain
  • Mendistribusikan malware, tautan phishing, atau konten berbahaya lainnya
  • Melanggar Kebijakan Bisnis WhatsApp atau Kebijakan Perdagangan
  • Melewati batas kecepatan atau menyalahgunakan API
  • Menjual kembali atau mensublisensikan akses API tanpa otorisasi tertulis

5. Kepatuhan API WhatsApp Business

Sebagai Penyedia Solusi Bisnis Meta, kami memfasilitasi akses ke WhatsApp Business API. Penggunaan pesan WhatsApp Anda tunduk pada Kebijakan Bisnis WhatsApp, Kebijakan Perdagangan WhatsApp, dan Ketentuan Layanan Meta. Anda bertanggung jawab untuk mendapatkan persetujuan yang tepat dari penerima pesan dan menggunakan template pesan yang disetujui.

6. Harga dan Pembayaran

Harga Layanan untuk paket langganan dan biaya penggunaan sesuai dengan yang dipublikasikan di situs web kami dan dapat diperbarui dengan pemberitahuan 14 hari. Biaya langganan ditagih setiap bulan, dan penggunaan pesan melebihi kuota paket ditagih sesuai pemakaian. Kami berhak menangguhkan Layanan untuk akun yang menunggak. Semua biaya tidak dapat dikembalikan kecuali sebagaimana ditentukan dalam Kebijakan Pengembalian kami.

7. Kekayaan Intelektual

Layanan, termasuk perangkat lunaknya, dokumentasi, API, dan desain, dimiliki oleh StartMessaging dan dilindungi oleh undang-undang kekayaan intelektual. Anda tidak boleh menyalin, memodifikasi, mendistribusikan, atau membuat karya turunan dari Layanan. Penggunaan Layanan tidak memberi Anda hak kepemilikan apa pun.

8. Ketersediaan Layanan

Kami berupaya untuk mencapai uptime API 99,9%. Pelanggan paket Enterprise menerima jaminan SLA formal. Kami tidak bertanggung jawab atas downtime yang disebabkan oleh pemeliharaan terjadwal (dengan pemberitahuan 24 jam), gangguan layanan pihak ketiga (Meta, jaringan telekomunikasi), atau penyalahgunaan API Anda.

9. Penafian Jaminan

LAYANAN DISEDIAKAN "SEBAGAIMANA ADANYA" DAN "SEBAGAIMANA TERSEDIA" TANPA JAMINAN APA PUN, TERSURAT MAUPUN TERSIRAT, SEJAUH YANG DIIZINKAN OLEH HUKUM.

10. Batasan Tanggung Jawab

SEJAUH YANG DIIZINKAN OLEH HUKUM, TOTAL TANGGUNG JAWAB STARTMESSAGING TIDAK AKAN MELEBIHI BIAYA YANG DIBAYARKAN OLEH ANDA DALAM 3 BULAN SEBELUM KLAIM. KAMI TIDAK BERTANGGUNG JAWAB ATAS KERUGIAN TIDAK LANGSUNG, INSIDENTAL, KONSEKUENSIAL, ATAU HUKUMAN.

11. Ganti Rugi

Anda setuju untuk mengganti rugi dan membebaskan StartMessaging dari klaim, kerugian, atau biaya apa pun yang timbul dari penggunaan Layanan oleh Anda, pelanggaran Ketentuan ini, atau pelanggaran hak pihak ketiga oleh Anda.

12. Pengakhiran

Salah satu pihak dapat mengakhiri Layanan kapan saja. Kami dapat menangguhkan atau mengakhiri akun Anda segera jika Anda melanggar Ketentuan ini atau kebijakan Penggunaan yang Dapat Diterima. Setelah pengakhiran, akses Anda ke Layanan akan dihentikan dan data Anda akan dihapus dalam 30 hari, kecuali diwajibkan oleh hukum.

13. Hukum yang Berlaku

Ketentuan ini diatur oleh hukum India. Setiap perselisihan akan diselesaikan di pengadilan Haryana, India.

14. Perubahan Ketentuan

Kami dapat memperbarui Ketentuan ini dengan pemberitahuan 14 hari melalui email atau pemberitahuan di situs web. Penggunaan berkelanjutan setelah tanggal berlaku merupakan penerimaan Ketentuan yang diperbarui.

15. Kontak

Untuk pertanyaan hukum: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Telepon: +91 6376383348
content.ar:
1. قبول الشروط

من خلال الوصول إلى موقع StartMessaging الإلكتروني وواجهات برمجة التطبيقات والخدمات (يُشار إليها مجتمعة بـ "الخدمة") أو استخدامها، فإنك توافق على الالتزام بشروط الاستخدام هذه ("الشروط"). إذا كنت لا توافق على هذه الشروط، فلا تستخدم الخدمة. إذا كنت تستخدم الخدمة نيابة عن مؤسسة، فأنت تقر بأن لديك السلطة لإلزام تلك المؤسسة بهذه الشروط.

2. وصف الخدمة

توفر StartMessaging واجهات برمجة تطبيقات المراسلة السحابية التي تمكن الشركات من إرسال واستقبال الرسائل عبر واجهة برمجة تطبيقات واتساب للأعمال. تشمل الخدمة الوصول إلى واجهة برمجة التطبيقات وأدوات لوحة التحكم والوثائق والدعم. يتم فوترة استخدامك على أساس اشتراك شهري وحجم رسائل حسب الاستخدام.

3. تسجيل الحساب

لاستخدام الخدمة، يجب عليك إنشاء حساب بمعلومات دقيقة وكاملة. أنت مسؤول عن الحفاظ على أمان بيانات اعتماد حسابك ومفاتيح واجهة برمجة التطبيقات. يجب عليك إخطارنا فوراً بأي وصول غير مصرح به إلى حسابك. لسنا مسؤولين عن الخسائر الناتجة عن الاستخدام غير المصرح به لحسابك.

4. الاستخدام المقبول

توافق على استخدام الخدمة فقط لأغراض مشروعة وبما يتوافق مع جميع القوانين واللوائح المعمول بها. لا يجوز لك استخدام الخدمة من أجل:

  • إرسال رسائل عشوائية أو غير مرغوب فيها إلى جهات اتصال لم تمنح موافقتها
  • إرسال رسائل تحتوي على محتوى غير قانوني أو تهديدي أو مسيء أو تشهيري أو فاحش
  • انتحال هوية شخص أو كيان آخر
  • توزيع برامج ضارة أو روابط تصيد أو محتوى ضار آخر
  • انتهاك سياسة واتساب التجارية أو سياسة التجارة
  • تجاوز حدود المعدل أو إساءة استخدام واجهة برمجة التطبيقات
  • إعادة بيع أو ترخيص الوصول إلى واجهة برمجة التطبيقات من الباطن دون تصريح خطي

5. الامتثال لواجهة برمجة تطبيقات واتساب للأعمال

بصفتنا مزود حلول أعمال Meta، نحن نسهل الوصول إلى واجهة برمجة تطبيقات واتساب للأعمال. يخضع استخدامك لمراسلة واتساب لسياسة واتساب التجارية وسياسة التجارة وشروط خدمة Meta. أنت مسؤول عن الحصول على موافقة مناسبة من مستلمي الرسائل واستخدام قوالب رسائل معتمدة.

6. الأسعار والدفع

أسعار الخدمة لخطط الاشتراك ورسوم الاستخدام هي كما هو منشور على موقعنا الإلكتروني ويمكن تحديثها بإشعار مدته 14 يوماً. يتم فوترة رسوم الاشتراك شهرياً، ويتم فوترة استخدام الرسائل الزائد عن الحد المسموح به حسب الاستهلاك. نحتفظ بالحق في تعليق الخدمة للحسابات المتأخرة. جميع الرسوم غير قابلة للاسترداد إلا كما هو محدد في سياسة الاسترداد الخاصة بنا.

7. الملكية الفكرية

الخدمة، بما في ذلك برامجها ووثائقها وواجهات برمجة التطبيقات وتصميمها، مملوكة لشركة StartMessaging ومحمية بقوانين الملكية الفكرية. لا يجوز لك نسخ الخدمة أو تعديلها أو توزيعها أو إنشاء أعمال مشتقة منها. لا يمنحك استخدام الخدمة أي حقوق ملكية.

8. وقت تشغيل الخدمة

نسعى جاهدين لتحقيق وقت تشغيل لواجهة برمجة التطبيقات بنسبة 99.9%. يحصل عملاء خطة المؤسسات على ضمانات اتفاقية مستوى الخدمة الرسمية. لسنا مسؤولين عن التوقف الناجم عن الصيانة المجدولة (بإشعار 24 ساعة) أو انقطاع خدمات الأطراف الثالثة (Meta، شبكات الاتصالات) أو إساءة استخدامك لواجهة برمجة التطبيقات.

9. إخلاء المسؤولية عن الضمانات

يتم تقديم الخدمة "كما هي" و"حسب التوفر" دون أي ضمانات من أي نوع، صريحة أو ضمنية، إلى أقصى حد يسمح به القانون.

10. تحديد المسؤولية

إلى أقصى حد يسمح به القانون، لن تتجاوز المسؤولية الإجمالية لشركة STARTMESSAGING الرسوم المدفوعة من قبلك في الأشهر الثلاثة السابقة للمطالبة. لسنا مسؤولين عن الأضرار غير المباشرة أو العرضية أو التبعية أو العقابية.

11. التعويض

توافق على تعويض StartMessaging وإبراء ذمتها من أي مطالبات أو أضرار أو نفقات ناشئة عن استخدامك للخدمة أو انتهاكك لهذه الشروط أو انتهاكك لأي حقوق لأطراف ثالثة.

12. الإنهاء

يجوز لأي من الطرفين إنهاء الخدمة في أي وقت. يجوز لنا تعليق حسابك أو إنهاؤه فوراً إذا انتهكت هذه الشروط أو سياسة الاستخدام المقبول. عند الإنهاء، سيتم إيقاف وصولك إلى الخدمة وحذف بياناتك في غضون 30 يوماً، ما لم يكن القانون يتطلب خلاف ذلك.

13. القانون الحاكم

تخضع هذه الشروط لقوانين الهند. يتم حل أي نزاعات في محاكم راجستان، الهند.

14. التغييرات على الشروط

يجوز لنا تحديث هذه الشروط بإشعار مدته 14 يوماً عبر البريد الإلكتروني أو إشعار على الموقع. يعتبر الاستمرار في الاستخدام بعد تاريخ السريان قبولاً للشروط المحدثة.

15. اتصل بنا

للاستفسارات القانونية: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | الهاتف: +91 6376383348
content.tr:
1. Şartların Kabulü

StartMessaging'in web sitesine, API'lerine ve hizmetlerine (toplu olarak "Hizmet") erişerek veya bunları kullanarak, bu Kullanım Şartları'na ("Şartlar") bağlı olmayı kabul etmiş olursunuz. Bu Şartları kabul etmiyorsanız, Hizmeti kullanmayın. Hizmeti bir kuruluş adına kullanıyorsanız, o kuruluşu bu Şartlara bağlama yetkisine sahip olduğunuzu beyan edersiniz.

2. Hizmet Açıklaması

StartMessaging, işletmelerin WhatsApp Business API aracılığıyla mesaj göndermesini ve almasını sağlayan bulut tabanlı mesajlaşma API'leri sağlar. Hizmet, API erişimi, kontrol paneli araçları, dokümantasyon ve destek içerir. Kullanımınız aylık abonelik ve kullandıkça öde mesaj hacmi bazında faturalandırılır.

3. Hesap Kaydı

Hizmeti kullanmak için doğru ve eksiksiz bilgilerle bir hesap oluşturmanız gerekir. Hesap kimlik bilgilerinizin ve API anahtarlarınızın güvenliğini sağlamaktan siz sorumlusunuz. Hesabınıza yetkisiz erişim durumunda bizi derhal bilgilendirmelisiniz. Hesabınızın yetkisiz kullanımından kaynaklanan kayıplardan sorumlu değiliz.

4. Kabul Edilebilir Kullanım

Hizmeti yalnızca yasal amaçlarla ve tüm geçerli yasa ve düzenlemelere uygun olarak kullanmayı kabul edersiniz. Hizmeti aşağıdaki amaçlarla KULLANAMAZSINIZ:

  • Onay vermemiş kişilere spam veya istenmeyen mesajlar göndermek
  • Yasadışı, tehdit edici, kötüye kullanılan, iftira niteliğinde veya müstehcen içerikli mesajlar göndermek
  • Başka bir kişi veya kuruluşun kimliğine bürünmek
  • Kötü amaçlı yazılım, oltalama bağlantıları veya zararlı içerik dağıtmak
  • WhatsApp İş Politikasını veya Ticaret Politikasını ihlal etmek
  • Hız sınırlarını aşmak veya API'yi kötüye kullanmak
  • Yazılı izin olmadan API erişimini yeniden satmak veya alt lisanslamak

5. WhatsApp Business API Uyumluluğu

Meta İş Çözümleri Sağlayıcısı olarak WhatsApp Business API'ye erişimi kolaylaştırıyoruz. WhatsApp mesajlaşma kullanımınız Meta'nın WhatsApp İş Politikası, WhatsApp Ticaret Politikası ve Meta Hizmet Şartlarına tabidir. Mesaj alıcılarından uygun onay almaktan ve onaylı mesaj şablonları kullanmaktan siz sorumlusunuz.

6. Fiyatlandırma ve Ödeme

Abonelik planları ve kullanım ücretleri için Hizmet fiyatlandırması web sitemizde yayınlandığı şekildedir ve 14 gün önceden bildirimle güncellenebilir. Abonelik ücretleri aylık olarak faturalandırılır ve plan kotasını aşan mesaj kullanımı tüketime göre faturalandırılır. Vadesi geçmiş hesaplar için Hizmeti askıya alma hakkımızı saklı tutarız. Tüm ücretler, İade Politikamızda belirtilenler hariç, iade edilemez.

7. Fikri Mülkiyet

Yazılımı, dokümantasyonu, API'leri ve tasarımı dahil olmak üzere Hizmet, StartMessaging'e aittir ve fikri mülkiyet yasaları tarafından korunmaktadır. Hizmeti kopyalayamaz, değiştiremez, dağıtamaz veya Hizmetten türev eserler oluşturamazsınız. Hizmeti kullanmanız size herhangi bir mülkiyet hakkı vermez.

8. Hizmet Çalışma Süresi

%99,9 API çalışma süresi hedefliyoruz. Kurumsal plan müşterileri resmi SLA garantileri alır. Planlı bakımdan (24 saat önceden bildirimle), üçüncü taraf hizmet kesintilerinden (Meta, telekomünikasyon ağları) veya API'yi kötüye kullanmanızdan kaynaklanan kesintilerden sorumlu değiliz.

9. Garanti Reddi

HİZMET, YASALARIN İZİN VERDİĞİ AZAMİ ÖLÇÜDE, AÇIK VEYA ZIMNİ HİÇBİR GARANTİ OLMAKSIZIN "OLDUĞU GİBİ" VE "MEVCUT OLDUĞU ŞEKİLDE" SUNULMAKTADIR.

10. Sorumluluk Sınırlaması

YASALARIN İZİN VERDİĞİ AZAMİ ÖLÇÜDE, STARTMESSAGING'İN TOPLAM SORUMLULUĞU, TALEPTEKİ 3 AY ÖNCESİNDE TARAFINIZCA ÖDENEN ÜCRETLERİ AŞMAYACAKTIR. DOLAYLI, ARIZİ, SONUÇSAL VEYA CEZAİ ZARARLARDAN SORUMLU DEĞİLİZ.

11. Tazminat

Hizmeti kullanımınızdan, bu Şartları ihlal etmenizden veya üçüncü taraf haklarını ihlal etmenizden kaynaklanan tüm talepler, zararlar veya masraflara karşı StartMessaging'i tazmin etmeyi ve zararsız tutmayı kabul edersiniz.

12. Fesih

Taraflardan herhangi biri Hizmeti istediği zaman feshedebilir. Bu Şartları veya Kabul Edilebilir Kullanım politikasını ihlal ederseniz hesabınızı derhal askıya alabilir veya feshedebiliriz. Fesih üzerine, Hizmete erişiminiz sona erecek ve verileriniz, yasaların gerektirdiği durumlar hariç, 30 gün içinde silinecektir.

13. Geçerli Hukuk

Bu Şartlar Hindistan yasalarına tabidir. Tüm uyuşmazlıklar Hindistan, Haryana mahkemelerinde çözülecektir.

14. Şartlardaki Değişiklikler

Bu Şartları e-posta veya web sitesi bildirimi ile 14 gün önceden bildirimle güncelleyebiliriz. Yürürlük tarihinden sonra kullanıma devam etmek, güncellenen Şartların kabul edildiği anlamına gelir.

15. İletişim

Hukuki sorularınız için: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Telefon: +91 6376383348
content.ng:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using StartMessaging's website, APIs, and services (collectively, the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms.

2. Description of Service

StartMessaging provides cloud-based messaging APIs that enable businesses to send and receive messages via the WhatsApp Business API. The Service includes API access, dashboard tools, documentation, and support. Your usage is billed on a monthly subscription and pay-as-you-go message volume basis.

3. Account Registration

To use the Service, you must create an account with accurate and complete information. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and API keys. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access to your account. We are not liable for losses arising from unauthorized use of your account.

4. Acceptable Use

You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes and in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations, including the Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA) 2023 and the Nigerian Communications Commission (NCC) consumer protection regulations. You may NOT use the Service to:

  • Send spam or unsolicited messages to contacts who have not opted in
  • Send messages containing illegal, threatening, abusive, defamatory, or obscene content
  • Impersonate another person or entity
  • Distribute malware, phishing links, or other harmful content
  • Violate WhatsApp's Business Policy or Commerce Policy
  • Circumvent rate limits or abuse the API
  • Resell or sublicense API access without written authorization

5. WhatsApp Business API Compliance

As a Meta Business Solution Provider, we facilitate access to the WhatsApp Business API. Your use of WhatsApp messaging is subject to Meta's WhatsApp Business Policy, WhatsApp Commerce Policy, and Meta's Terms of Service. You are responsible for obtaining proper opt-in consent from message recipients and using approved message templates.

6. Pricing and Payment

Service pricing for subscription plans and usage fees is as published on our website and may be updated with 14 days' notice. Subscription fees are billed monthly, and message usage beyond the plan allowance is billed as incurred. We reserve the right to suspend the Service for overdue accounts. All fees are non-refundable except as specified in our Refund Policy.

7. Intellectual Property

The Service, including its software, documentation, APIs, and design, is owned by StartMessaging and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works from the Service. Your use of the Service does not grant you any ownership rights.

8. Service Uptime

We strive for 99.9% API uptime. Enterprise plan customers receive formal SLA guarantees. We are not liable for downtime caused by scheduled maintenance (with 24-hour notice), third-party service outages (Meta, telecommunications networks), or your misuse of the API.

9. Disclaimer of Warranties

THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW.

10. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, STARTMESSAGING'S TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE FEES PAID BY YOU IN THE 3 MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM. WE ARE NOT LIABLE FOR INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES.

11. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold StartMessaging harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from your use of the Service, your violation of these Terms, or your infringement of any third-party rights.

12. Termination

Either party may terminate the Service at any time. We may suspend or terminate your account immediately if you violate these Terms or the Acceptable Use policy. Upon termination, your access to the Service will cease and your data will be deleted within 30 days, except as required by law.

13. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Haryana, India.

14. NDPA Compliance

We process personal data of Nigerian users in compliance with the Nigeria Data Protection Act (NDPA) 2023. By using our Service, you acknowledge that your data handling through our APIs must also comply with NDPA requirements, including obtaining lawful basis for processing, providing data subjects with transparent privacy notices, and reporting data breaches within the required timelines.

15. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms with 14 days' notice via email or website notice. Continued use after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

16. Contact

For legal inquiries: startmessagingdotcom@gmail.com | Phone: +91 6376383348
